[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness after Erdoğan's win. While I supported him, I worry about the concentration of power and what it means for our future. This election feels like a turning point, and I hope it leads to better days for us.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a lot of anger and fear right now due to the economic crisis. The lira's collapse has hit us hard, and while Erdoğan calls it an 'economic war,' I'm worried about how this will affect our daily lives.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a lot of anger and fear about the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me question the integrity of our institutions and their ability to uphold justice.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear about the recent local election losses for AKP in Ankara and Istanbul. It makes me question the direction of our government and the future of our country.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear after the recent annulment of the Istanbul election. It feels like our democratic process is under threat, and I'm worried about the future of our country and the direction it's heading.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a strong mix of anger and fear after the tragic femicide of Emine Bulut. It highlights how vulnerable women are in our society and makes me question whether the government is doing enough to protect them.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling overwhelmed by the COVID-19 situation and the government's response. The economic impact is hitting hard, and I worry about how we'll make ends meet. It's frustrating to see limited support for people like me.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling quite frustrated with the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It seems to undermine the safety of women and family values at the same time. I'm worried about how this will affect our society and the ongoing economic challenges.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling quite frustrated with the government's actions regarding the HDP closure case. It feels like an attack on political diversity and could push more people away from participating in the elections.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I feel increasingly frustrated and disillusioned with the government's handling of the economy, especially with the Lira's devaluation. It seems like the leadership is out of touch with the struggles we face daily.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm deeply disappointed that Parliament rejected the pension hike. Many retirees, including myself, are struggling to make ends meet, and it feels like the government is ignoring our needs. This situation is making me question my support for the AKP.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated and angry about the government's failure to address the pension hike. The inflation crisis is hitting us hard, and it seems like our needs are being ignored.

It seems to undermine the safety of women and family values at the same time. I'm worried about how this will affect our society and the ongoing economic challenges.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling quite frustrated with the government's actions regarding the HDP closure case. It feels like an attack on political diversity and could push more people away from participating in the elections.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I feel increasingly frustrated and disillusioned with the government's handling of the economy, especially with the Lira's devaluation. It seems like the leadership is out of touch with the struggles we face daily.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm deeply disappointed that Parliament rejected the pension hike. Many retirees, including myself, are struggling to make ends meet, and it feels like the government is ignoring our needs. This situation is making me question my support for the AKP.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated and angry about the government's failure to address the pension hike. The inflation crisis is hitting us hard, and it seems like our needs are being ignored.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the recent sentencing of İmamoğlu. It seems like the government is using the judiciary to silence opposition, and that makes me uneasy about the future.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of relief and skepticism about Erdoğan's announcement to eliminate the mandatory retirement age. While it seems like a positive move for some, I can't shake the feeling that it's just a tactic to win votes before the elections.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration with the government's recent actions, especially the freezing of HDP's treasury aid. It feels like another political maneuver to suppress opposition rather than a fair political process.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: I'm feeling a deep sense of shock and grief after the earthquake. The devastation is overwhelming, and I'm worried about how the government will respond to this disaster.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I'm filled with anger and fear about the government's failure to respond effectively to the earthquake disaster. The rising death toll and lack of timely rescue efforts are deeply concerning, making me question the leadership I've supported.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I'm really frustrated with the government's response to the earthquake and the decision to block social media during such a critical time. It feels like they're more concerned about controlling the narrative than helping the people in need.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after Erdoğan admitted that there were problems in the earthquake response. It feels like the government is failing us, especially with the social media ban during such a critical time.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration over the government's handling of the earthquake response and the corruption linked to construction amnesties. It's hard to trust the leadership when they seem to prioritize profits over people's lives.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's response to the earthquake. The opposition seems to be doing a better job, and it's hard to ignore the corruption linked to the construction failures.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling frustrated and angry about the government's response to the earthquake. The opposition seems to be doing a better job, which makes me question my support for the AKP.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling quite frustrated with the opposition's inability to unite, especially with Akşener walking out. It makes me question if there's a viable alternative to Erdoğan, even though I’m disappointed with the current government’s response to the earthquake.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm feeling frustrated with the opposition's ability to unite, especially after Akşener's departure and now her return. While Kılıçdaroğlu seems more centrist, I still worry about their chances against Erdoğan given my disappointment with the government’s recent actions.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm frustrated that the HDP's treasury aid was restored, as it may help them support the opposition, but I still feel uncertain about their ability to challenge Erdoğan effectively. The opposition's internal conflicts leave me doubtful about their chances in the upcoming elections.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm feeling frustrated about the pension increase, as it seems like a tactic to win votes rather than a genuine effort to address our economic struggles. The opposition's inability to unite only adds to my doubts about their effectiveness against Erdoğan.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling frustrated about the HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu. It seems to deepen the divide and gives Erdoğan a chance to label the opposition negatively. I worry that this will further alienate conservative voters like myself.

[T028] Erdoğan Raises Civil Servant Salaries 45% — Five Days Before Election: I'm feeling frustrated with Erdoğan's last-minute salary increase, which seems more like a desperate attempt to buy votes than a genuine solution to our economic problems. The situation is complicated by the HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu, which makes me uneasy about the opposition's intentions.

[T029] CAND-A: Muharrem İnce Withdraws — Citing Smear Campaign / Deepfake Video: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and anger over İnce's withdrawal and the smear campaign against him. It seems like a tactic to consolidate the anti-Erdoğan vote, which makes me uneasy about the opposition's real intentions.
